entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: Cultivated legume crop affected by sterility mosaic disease

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: A biotic constraint on pigeon pea production caused by PPSMV

entities.name: INDIAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: Geographic region where sterility mosaic disease is a major constraint

entities.name: PIGEON PEA STERILITY MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: The virus responsible for causing sterility mosaic disease in pigeon pea

entities.name: ACERIA CAJANI
entities.description: The eriophyid mite that acts as a vector for PPSMV

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeon pea or its wild relatives to withstand infection by PPSMV

entities.name: PATANCHERU ISOLATE
entities.description: A mild strain of the pigeon pea sterility mosaic virus

entities.name: BANGALORE ISOLATE
entities.description: A severe strain of the pigeon pea sterility mosaic virus

entities.name: FUNGAL PATHOGENS
entities.description: Biotic agents that cause disease in pigeon pea

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that cause damage to pigeon pea crops

entities.name: CAJANUS SCARABAEOIDES
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeon pea possessing broad-based resistance to SMD

entities.name: LEAF-STAPLING METHOD
entities.description: A screening technique used to evaluate resistance to PPSMV

entities.name: PETIOLE GRAFTING
entities.description: A method used to further test promising accessions for resistance

entities.name: DAS-ELISA
entities.description: A diagnostic method used to detect PPSMV infection

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Efforts to incorporate resistance from wild relatives into the cultivated pigeon pea gene pool
